dialogue_tree.greeting: Welcome to the Tibian Bank! I can {change gold} into platinum coins, or {change platinum} into crystal coins. How may I help you?

name.text: I am the Banker. I manage the local branch of the Tibian Bank.

job.text: I exchange coins for adventurers. Say {change gold} to convert gold coins to platinum, or {change platinum} to convert platinum to crystal coins.

change gold.text: How many platinum coins would you like to receive? Each platinum coin costs 100 gold coins. Tell me a number.

change platinum.text: How many crystal coins would you like to receive? Each crystal coin costs 100 platinum coins. Tell me a number.
